name: notion
description: Notion tools for Codex. Built and maintained by Zapier.

interface.shortDescription: Search, read, create, and edit Notion content from your agent.
interface.longDescription: Agent-callable Notion tools — search pages and databases, read and create pages, query data sources, append content, manage schemas, and post comments. An independent, unofficial connector built by Zapier; not affiliated with or endorsed by Notion.
defaultPrompt: Search my Notion workspace and summarize what you find
Create a Notion page from these meeting notes
Query the database for rows matching this filter
